blacksmith_legacy_ending.title: Legacy
blacksmith_legacy_ending.description: You passed down your craft, but repeated the hardness that shaped you.

blacksmith_craft_with_love_ending.title: Craft with Love
blacksmith_craft_with_love_ending.description: You treated your apprentice like a son, and your name lived through care instead of control.

builder_rome_stepping_stone_ending.title: A Rome Stepping Stone
builder_rome_stepping_stone_ending.description: You built pieces of Rome, but Rome never truly belonged to you.

fighter_legend_ending.title: The Legend
fighter_legend_ending.description: You followed Spartacus, fought Rome, and died without surrender.

fighter_coward_ending.title: The Coward
fighter_coward_ending.description: You kneeled to Rome, but Rome still made an example of you.

fighter_warrior_ending.title: A Warrior?
fighter_warrior_ending.description: You survived the rebellion by staying behind, only to die nameless in the arena.

trader_gambler_ending.title: The Gambler
trader_gambler_ending.description: You mistook political danger for opportunity, and the gamble consumed your fortune.

trader_wise_merchant_ending.title: Wise Merchant
trader_wise_merchant_ending.description: You left Rome’s dangerous politics behind and turned wealth into a stable life.

poet_artist_ending.title: The Artist
poet_artist_ending.description: You had a voice, memory, and longing for art, but Rome gave respect only to poets with patrons.

poet_somebody_nobody_ending.title: Somebody? Nobody?
poet_somebody_nobody_ending.description: You lived as a respected poet, but even preservation could not answer whether fame made you truly known.

soldier_honored_roman_life_ending.title: Honored Roman Life
soldier_honored_roman_life_ending.description: You served Rome, survived war, and lived out your final years as an honored veteran.
